GenAiFunction.description:
Query records from Standard and Custom SObjects via SOQL (SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, GROUP BY, aggregates, sub-queries). Read-only.
Use when: - Reading org business data: "my open opportunities", "accounts in California", "tasks due this week", "count of cases by status". - Any question about Account, Contact, Opportunity, Case, Task, User, custom __c objects, etc.
NOT for: - Data Cloud entities (names ending in __dlm, __dll, __cio) — use QueryDataCloud with SQL. - Unstructured document content (PDFs, uploaded files, policies) — use SearchDataLibrary. - Creating, updating, or deleting records — use CallRestApi. - Development metadata (ApexClass, CustomField definitions, ValidationRule) — use CallToolingApi.
Preconditions: - Standard objects and their well-known fields are safe to use directly. - For Custom Objects and Custom Fields, ALWAYS call ExploreOrgSchema FIRST — never guess __c names.
Retry behavior: - On errors, parse the returned exception JSON, fix the SOQL, retry a few times. - If still stuck, use SearchWeb to look up the correct syntax / field / object, then retry.
Output: - Returns JSON array on success, JSON error object on failure — raw JSON is NOT shown to the user. - Parse and format: tables, lists, or summaries; compress large results; include record links; for aggregates, explain what the numbers mean. Translate errors into user-friendly language.
